<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the other yellow U-shape inside the yellow container (node 23 at center 44.1, 24.0)
bt = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
at = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in bt['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in at['nodes']}
for nid in after_nodes:
    if nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        an = after_nodes[nid]
        if an['color'] != bn['color'] or an['pixels'] != bn['pixels']:
            msg = "Node %d: color %s->%s, pixels %d->%d" % (nid, bn['color'], an['color'], bn['pixels'], an['pixels'])
            print(msg)

# Now let me also check current state of key nodes
curr_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
print("Current state of key nodes:")
for nid in [16, 2, 29, 30]:
    if nid in curr_nodes:
        n = curr_nodes[nid]
        print("  Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d" % (nid, n['color'], n['pixels']))
</parameter>
